name: Veterans Crisis Line
description: 24/7 crisis support for veterans in emotional or suicidal crisis. Confidential peer support available immediately.
who_should_use: Veterans experiencing suicidal thoughts, emotional distress, or mental health crisis

name: VA Benefits Hotline
description: General VA benefits information and enrollment assistance. Helps with disability, education, and health benefits questions.
who_should_use: Veterans seeking information about VA benefits eligibility and enrollment

name: VA Health Benefits Eligibility
description: Questions about VA health care eligibility, enrollment, and verification of military service.
who_should_use: Veterans determining if they qualify for VA health care services

name: White House VA Hotline
description: Escalation hotline for major VA complaints and issues that require immediate attention from leadership.
who_should_use: Veterans with unresolved serious complaints or issues requiring escalation to VA leadership

name: VA Office of Inspector General Hotline
description: Fraud, waste, and abuse reporting hotline. Report VA employee misconduct or fraudulent VA activities.
who_should_use: Anyone reporting fraud, waste, abuse, or misconduct within the VA system

name: Department of Defense Office of Inspector General
description: DoD hotline for reporting fraud, waste, and misconduct in military and defense programs.
who_should_use: Active duty and veterans reporting DoD-related fraud or misconduct

name: CHAMPVA Customer Service
description: CHAMPVA health insurance questions for spouses and dependents of deceased veterans.
who_should_use: Spouses and dependents of deceased/disabled veterans on CHAMPVA insurance

name: Caregiver Support Hotline
description: Support resources for family members caring for veterans. Includes counseling, respite care info, and support groups.
who_should_use: Family members and caregivers supporting veterans

name: Homeless Veterans Support Line
description: Crisis support and housing resources for veterans experiencing homelessness or housing insecurity.
who_should_use: Veterans facing homelessness or in immediate housing crisis

name: VA Patient Advocate
description: VA health care complaint resolution. Address concerns about VA medical care and provider conduct.
who_should_use: Veterans with complaints about VA health care services or facilities

name: MyVA411 Call Center
description: General information about all VA programs and benefits. Routing service to appropriate VA departments.
who_should_use: Veterans seeking general VA information and benefit routing

name: USERRA/ESGR Ombudsman Hotline
description: Support for employment rights under USERRA. Assistance with job reintegration and employment discrimination.
who_should_use: Service members and veterans with employment or job reintegration issues

name: State Veterans Service Officers
description: State-level veteran service officers providing benefits counseling and claim assistance.
who_should_use: Veterans seeking state-level benefits and claims assistance

name: VA Mental Health Crisis Support
description: Mental health crisis support within VA system. Connects to local VA mental health services.
who_should_use: Veterans in mental health crisis enrolled in VA health care

name: VA Disability Benefits Hotline
description: Specific hotline for disability compensation and pension questions. Claims status and appeals.
who_should_use: Veterans filing or appealing disability compensation claims

name: GI Bill Education Benefits Hotline
description: Questions about GI Bill and VA education benefits. School certifications and enrollment.
who_should_use: Veterans and service members using GI Bill and education benefits

name: Vocational Rehabilitation & Employment Hotline
description: Support for VR&E programs for disabled veterans. Career counseling and training assistance.
who_should_use: Disabled veterans seeking vocational rehabilitation and employment support

name: VA Home Loans Hotline
description: Questions about VA home loan guaranty. Loan pre-qualification and lender information.
who_should_use: Veterans seeking VA home loan benefits or experiencing home loan issues

name: VA Life Insurance Hotline
description: Questions about SGLI, VGLI, and other VA life insurance programs.
who_should_use: Active duty, veterans, and beneficiaries with VA life insurance questions

name: National Veterans Foundation Hotline
description: Crisis line and supportive services for veterans in emotional distress.
who_should_use: Veterans experiencing emotional distress or crisis
